items.name: IPC round-trip and worker lifecycle validation
validation: P0-1: settled flag prevents double-resolve — tested with safeResolve pattern ✓
P0-1: settled flag prevents resolve after reject — tested with safeReject-first pattern ✓
P0-3: process.send undefined in test process (simulates missing IPC) — returns false ✓
F2: frame type allowlist rejects unknown types (evil_payload, __proto__, constructor, error, budget_exceeded) ✓
F2: all 9 valid frame types accepted by allowlist ✓

items.name: Mutex queue correctness under contention
validation: 10 concurrent acquires on same key execute in strict FIFO order (0-9) ✓
5 keys × 3 acquires: cross-key concurrency verified, same-key FIFO verified ✓
Release wakes exactly one waiter (not all) — counted incrementally ✓
Acquire-release-acquire cycle (5 iterations) leaves no stale state ✓
Double-release is no-op ✓
3+ concurrent acquires (original P1-2 repro) pass ✓
All 10 mutex tests pass ✓

items.name: Security hardening validation
validation: F3: execArgv filter strips --inspect, --inspect-brk, --debug; preserves --require, --import ✓
F5: rate limit key is 64-char hex hash, not raw token ✓
F2: frame allowlist rejects malicious types ✓

items.name: Worker behavior validation
validation: P0-1: settled flag pattern prevents double-resolve (2 tests) ✓
P0-3: send() gracefully handles missing process.send ✓

items.name: Worker environment isolation
validation: buildShellEnv includes agent env keys + safe system vars ✓
Worker env construction includes only expected keys (no DATABASE_URL, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, NODE_ENV) ✓
Missing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is omitted (not empty string) ✓
Agent-specific keys from loadAgentEnv pass through ✓
